prTitle: feat: implement handoff template rendering and pod CLAUDE.md injection
prBody:
## Summary

Implements the `coo-cli-workspace-feat-handoff-injection` feature (Sprint 4) — the CLAUDE.md context injection system for handoff-mode workspaces.

### What was implemented

**`internal/handoff/context.go`**
- `HandoffData` struct and sub-types (`ArtifactPaths`, `SprintInfo`, `FeatureInfo`, `TaskInfo`, `WorkerInfo`)
- `FetchHandoffData(ctx, dynamicClient, systemNS, conceptName)` — queries the k8s API for all COO CRDs (COOConcept, COOPlan, COOSprints, COOFeatures, COOTasks, COOWorkers) using the dynamic client. COOConcept is required; all other resources are best-effort (errors silently skipped so partial data still produces a useful template)
- `InjectCLAUDEMD(content, podName, namespace, ...)` — streams rendered content into `/tmp/coo-handoff.md` via `kubectl exec -i` stdin, then runs a shell script to back up the existing `/workspace/CLAUDE.md` to `.original`, write the new header, and append the historical content
- `extractInt64` helper handles both `int64` and `float64` JSON number types from the k8s API

**`internal/handoff/template.go`**
- Go `text/template` rendering of the CLAUDE.md handoff header
- `Render(data *HandoffData) (string, error)` — renders all required sections: warning header, itsacoo explanation, project metadata, planning artifacts table, sprint/feature/task/worker tables, and phase-specific guidance (Planned → review planning PR; Executing → pick up open tasks; other → generic guidance)
- `taskIcon` template func maps task phase to ✅ (Completed/Done/Merged) or ⏳

**`internal/runtime/k8s.go`**
- `CreateWorkspace` now captures the pod name from `waitForReady` and calls `injectHandoffContext` when mode is "handoff"
- Injection failure is non-fatal: logs a warning and continues to the exec session

### Tests
- `internal/handoff/template_test.go` — 9 tests covering header rendering, concept/phase output, task icons, artifact paths, empty-list fallbacks, and workers
- `internal/handoff/context_test.go` — tests for `FetchHandoffData` happy path (fake HTTP server), missing concept error, partial data tolerance, and `kubectlExecArgs` argument ordering

Closes #20
